description: Start and end timestamps for a selected live TD stage.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT :well_name AS well_name, :stage_num AS stage_num, CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (((:stage_num) - 1) * 1800)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS start_time, CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (((:stage_num) - 1) * 1800 + 1200)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS end_time ) q
